description: Read-only population summary used to scope the destructive cleanup request. No mutations were submitted.
query: {"allDocuments": count(*[]), "contentDocumentsExcludingAssetsAndSystem": count(*[!(_type in ["sanity.imageAsset", "sanity.fileAsset", "sanity.assist.task.status", "sanity.previewUrlSecret", "system.group", "system.release", "system.retention", "system.schema"])]), "draftDocuments": count(*[_id in path("drafts.**")]), "systemDocuments": count(*[_type in ["sanity.assist.task.status", "sanity.previewUrlSecret", "system.group", "system.release", "system.retention", "system.schema"]]), "assetDocuments": count(*[_type in ["sanity.imageAsset", "sanity.fileAsset"]])}
